title: LifeStraw Water Filter — 4000L Clean Drinking Water
short_description: Portable water filter for up to 4000 liters. Removes 99.9% of bacteria and parasites. Perfect for trekking and emergencies.
long_description: The LifeStraw water filter is a lifesaving tool for outdoor enthusiasts. It filters up to 4000 liters of contaminated water, removing 99.9% of bacteria, parasites, and microplastics. No pumping, no chemicals — just drink through the straw. Weighing only 57g, it fits in any bag.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who prioritize practical features: 4000L filter capacity, 99.9% bacteria removal, no chemicals.
